requestBody.description: Subscription details including member, plan, and billing information

get.description: Retrieves comprehensive list of all membership subscriptions with filtering, pagination, and analytics. Supports filtering by status, plan type, member, billing cycle, and date ranges. Provides subscription metrics and revenue insights.

parameters.name: dueForRenewal
parameters.description: Show subscriptions due for renewal within 7 days

parameters.name: startDateTo
parameters.description: Filter subscriptions starting up to this date

parameters.name: startDateFrom
parameters.description: Filter subscriptions starting from this date

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of subscriptions per page (default: 20, max: 100)

description.example: Full gym access with premium amenities

patch.description: Updates subscription details including plan changes, billing information, auto-renewal settings, and member preferences. Handles plan upgrades/downgrades, payment method updates, and status modifications. Calculates prorations for mid-cycle changes.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the subscription to update

requestBody.description: Updated subscription data - include only fields that need to be changed

message.example: Subscription updated successfully with prorated billing

400.description: Invalid update data provided or validation failed.

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to update this subscription.

404.description: Subscription not found or does not exist.

delete.description: Permanently removes a subscription from the system. This action cannot be undone and will revoke all associated member access. Only admins can delete subscriptions, and typically subscriptions are cancelled rather than deleted. Ensures all billing and access records are properly handled.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the subscription to delete

400.description: Invalid subscription ID provided.

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to delete subscriptions.

404.description: Subscription not found or does not exist.

409.description: Cannot delete subscription with active billing or pending payments.

post.description: Cancels an active subscription with specified cancellation timing (immediate or end of billing period). Handles refund calculations, access period management, and member notification. Preserves subscription history for analytics and compliance.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the subscription to cancel

requestBody.description: Cancellation details including timing and reason

feedback.example: Moving to another city for work

notifyMember.description: Whether to send cancellation confirmation to member

value.feedback: Unable to continue due to job loss

end_of_period.summary: Cancel at end of billing period

value.feedback: Moving to another city for work

400.description: Invalid cancellation data provided or subscription cannot be cancelled.

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to cancel subscriptions.

404.description: Subscription not found or already cancelled.

409.description: Cannot cancel subscription with pending payments or active promotional periods.

post.description: Creates a new audit log entry to track system activities, user actions, and important events. This endpoint is typically used internally by the system to maintain a complete audit trail for compliance and security purposes.

201.description: Audit log created successfully - Activity has been recorded in the audit trail.

400.description: Invalid audit log data - Check required fields, entity references, and action validity.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token.

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to create audit log entries.

404.description: User not found - The specified user ID for the audit log does not exist.

500.description: Internal server error while creating audit log entry.

get.description: Retrieves all audit log entries across the system including user activities, system events, and data modifications. This endpoint provides a comprehensive view of system usage for compliance, security monitoring, and debugging purposes.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token.

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to access audit logs. Only super admins can view comprehensive audit trails.

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving audit logs.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific audit log entry including the complete action details, user context, timestamps, and any associated metadata or change tracking information.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the audit log entry

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token.

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to access this audit log entry.

404.description: Audit log not found - The specified audit log ID does not exist.

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving audit log entry.

get.description: Retrieves all audit log entries related to a specific user including their login activities, data modifications, and system interactions. Useful for user activity monitoring and security investigations.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token.

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to access user audit logs.

404.description: User not found - The specified user ID does not exist or no audit logs found for this user.

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving user audit logs.

get.description: Retrieves all audit log entries related to a specific entity (such as a member, trainer, class, or membership plan) showing all modifications, access attempts, and related activities. Useful for tracking changes to specific records and compliance monitoring.

parameters.name: entityType
parameters.description: Type of entity to audit (e.g., member, trainer, class, membership_plan, gym)

parameters.name: entityId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the specific entity

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token.

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to access entity audit logs.

404.description: Entity not found - No audit logs found for the specified entity type and ID combination.

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving entity audit logs.

get.description: Retrieves all audit log entries for a specific type of action across the system (such as LOGIN, CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, etc.). Useful for monitoring specific types of activities and identifying patterns or anomalies in system usage.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Type of action to filter by (e.g., LOGIN, LOGOUT, CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, VIEW, APPROVE, REJECT)

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token.

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to access action-specific audit logs.

404.description: No audit logs found for the specified action type.

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving action-specific audit logs.

get.description: Retrieves all available roles in the system including system roles and custom roles. This endpoint is restricted to authenticated users and typically requires admin privileges.

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to access roles.

post.description: Creates a new custom role with specified permissions. Requires admin privileges.

201.description: The role has been successfully created.

409.description: Role with this name already exists.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific role by its unique identifier. Returns role details including name, description, and associated users.

value.name: TRAINER

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to access role details.

patch.description: Updates an existing role with new information. Requires admin privileges.

200.description: The role has been successfully updated.

delete.description: Deletes a role permanently. Requires admin privileges. Cannot delete system roles.

200.description: The role has been successfully deleted.

get.description: Retrieves role information by its exact name. This is useful for checking role permissions and user assignments. Common role names include SUPERADMIN, ADMIN, TRAINER, and MEMBER.

post.description: Creates a new invoice for a member, typically for membership fees, personal training sessions, or other gym services. The invoice can be associated with a subscription for recurring billing.

value.description: Personal training session with Trainer John

400.description: Invalid input data. Check validation errors.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token.

get.description: Retrieves all invoices in the system with optional filtering by status, member, or date range. This endpoint is typically restricted to admin and finance staff.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token.

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to access invoices.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific invoice including payment status, member details, and associated payments. This is useful for billing inquiries and financial reporting.

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to access invoice details.

patch.description: Updates invoice information such as amount, description, due date, or payment status. This endpoint is typically used by finance staff to correct billing errors or update payment terms.

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to update invoices.

post.description: Cancels an invoice, changing its status to "cancelled". This is typically done when an invoice was created in error, the service was not provided, or the member has been granted a refund. Cancelled invoices cannot be paid.

post.description: Records detailed workout session data including exercises performed, sets, reps, weights, duration, intensity levels, and member performance metrics. This endpoint allows trainers and members to track workout progress and maintain detailed training records.

requestBody.description: Workout session data including exercises, sets, performance metrics, and feedback

strength_training.summary: Strength training session with multiple exercises

exercises.notes: Felt strong today, form was good

memberFeedback.comments: Great workout today! Felt very energized.

value.trainerNotes: Member showed excellent form and progression.

cardio_session.summary: Cardio workout with distance and pace tracking

memberFeedback.comments: Good run, felt comfortable at this pace.

notes.example: Felt strong today, form was good

comments.example: Great workout today! Felt very energized and pushed myself harder than usual.

trainerNotes.example: Member showed excellent form and progression. Ready to increase weight next session.

400.description: Invalid workout log data provided or validation failed.

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to create workout logs.

404.description: Member not found or does not exist.

get.description: Retrieves comprehensive list of workout logs across all members with advanced filtering, analytics, and performance insights. Supports filtering by member, date range, workout type, intensity, muscle groups, and performance metrics. Provides training analytics and progress trends.

parameters.name: trainerId
parameters.description: Filter by trainer who created the log

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Filter logs up to this date (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of logs per page (default: 20, max: 100)

400.description: Invalid query parameters provided.

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to view workout logs.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific workout log including complete exercise data, set-by-set performance, member feedback, trainer notes, and analytics. Provides comprehensive view of the training session and progress tracking.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the workout log

notes.example: Felt strong today, form was good

comments.example: Great workout today! Felt very energized and pushed myself harder than usual.

trainerNotes.example: Member showed excellent form and progression. Ready to increase weight next session. Focus on maintaining proper breathing technique.

400.description: Invalid workout log ID provided.

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to view this workout log.

404.description: Workout log not found or does not exist.

get.summary: Get a workout log by ID

patch.description: Updates an existing workout log with corrected data, additional exercises, updated performance metrics, or revised feedback. Only the creator or authorized personnel can modify workout logs. Maintains history of all changes for audit purposes.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the workout log to update

requestBody.description: Updated workout log data - include only fields that need to be changed

add_exercise.summary: Add missing exercise to completed workout

exercises.notes: Added finisher exercise at the end

value.trainerNotes: Added push-ups as finisher - member completed extra work
Corrected barbell weight to include 20kg bar

comments.example: Updated feedback - felt even better than initially recorded

trainerNotes.example: Updated notes - member exceeded expectations, ready for progression

message.example: Workout log updated successfully with performance improvements

400.description: Invalid update data provided or validation failed.

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to update this workout log.

404.description: Workout log not found or does not exist.

delete.description: Permanently removes a workout log from the system. This action cannot be undone and will affect member progress tracking and analytics. Only admins, the log creator, or users with appropriate permissions can delete workout logs. Preserves member privacy and data integrity.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the workout log to delete

400.description: Invalid workout log ID provided.

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to delete this workout log.

404.description: Workout log not found or does not exist.
